mapper.select: SELECT p.pos_sale_id, p.upload_id, p.year_month, p.channel, p.total_revenue, p.avg_price, p.total_orders FROM pos_sales p JOIN upload u ON p.upload_id = u.upload_id WHERE u.store_id = #{storeId} AND p.year_month = TRUNC(#{yearMonth}, 'MM')
mapper.insert:
SELECT pos_sales_seq.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO pos_sales (pos_sale_id, upload_id, year_month, channel, total_revenue, avg_price, total_orders) VALUES (#{posSaleId}, #{uploadId}, #{yearMonth}, #{channel}, #{totalRevenue}, #{avgPrice}, #{totalOrders})
